Cloud-based services risks: Execution and competitive risks in cloud services
Investment risks: Significant investments may not achieve expected returns
Acquisition and partnership risks: Adverse effects from acquisitions, joint ventures, and strategic alliances
Financial and operational risks: Goodwill or amortizable intangible assets impairment
Disclosure and misuse of personal data
Issues in the use of AI
Outages, data losses, and disruptions of online services
Decrease in value of intellectual property
Global business operational and economic risks
Dependence on attracting and retaining talented employees
Regulatory and compliance risks: Laws and regulations relating to personal data
